chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1112 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 17.04.2024 Mr. Tariq Gul Mangi, Advocate for the Petitioner Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for Respondents No.2 to 5 Mr. Karim Bux Janweri, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan >>>>>..<<<<< At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition on merits provided Chief Executive Officer Sukkur Electric Power Company is directed to dispose of departmental appeal of the petitioner within two months, in accordance with law, if it is pending with him, which is not opposed by learned counsel appearing for other side. Order accordingly. The instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
